Document:
# Path of Lock
Difficulty: [color=orange]Medium[/color]
The Path of Lock revolves around access, area denial, theft and gadgets. Pick this path if you want a less confrontational playstyle and more interested in being a slippery rat.
## Pros
- Your mansus grasp can open any lock, unlock every terminal and bypass any access restriction. - Lock heretics get more side knowledge for free or at a discount, making it the perfect path if you want to experiment with the various trinkets the shop has to offer. - Lock heretics don't gain visible aura after 8 knowledge points, making it perfect for being stealthy at latter stages.
## Cons
- The weakest heretic path in direct combat, period. - Very limited direct combat benefits. - You have no defensive benefits or immunities. - No mobility or direct additional teleportation - Highly reliant on sourcing power from other departments, players and the game world.
## Knowledge
Knowledge Name Ingredients/Type Description
A Steward's Secret Knife, Crowbar Creates a key blade.
Grasp of Lock Passive Ability Your grasp can unlock anything.
Key Keepers Burden Door, ID Card, Iron rod Creates a Eldritch Card, allows you to link two doors to be portals for heretics, but randomly teleport heathens. It can also absorb access from id card by eating them.
Concierge's Rite Crayon, Wooden plank, Multitool Creates a labyrinth handbook, a magic item that can materialize barricades that noone can pass.
Burglar's Finesse Active Ability An ability that steals a random item from the targets backpack and puts it into your hand.
Opening Blade Passive Ability Your blade is now better at wounding and can cause weeping avulsion on attack.
Caretaker's Last Refuge Active Ability A spell that makes you transparent and not dense, you cannot harm or be harmed, except by anti-magic items.
Unlock the Labyrinth Three corpses with removed hearts Creates a labyrinth portal that rapidly summons creatures from Mansus, loyal to you. You get pressure and temperature immunity. Your blades are even deadlier. You can shapeshift into empowered creatures of Mansus.
## Armor and Passive Ability
Name Effect
T1 Passive
Shifting Guise Immunity to electrical shocks and stun baton knockdown.
T2 Passive Your grasp no longer goes on cooldown from opening locks.
T3 Passive X-ray vision.
## Tips
- Your mansus grasp allows you to access everything, from airlocks, consoles and even exosuits, but it has no additional effects on players. It will however leave a mark that when triggered will make your victim unable to leave the room you are in. - Your blade also functions as a crowbar! You can store it in utility belts And, in a pitch, use it to force open an airlock. - Weeping avulsion triggered by your blade cannot be healed by topicals and chemicals, requiring surgery to heal. - Triggering weeping avulsion on mangled torso force opens its ribcage, allowing you to easier ascend by removing heart via surgery. - Your Eldritch ID can create a portal between 2 different airlocks. Useful if you want to establish a secret base. - Use your labyrinth book to shake off pursuers. It creates impassible walls to anyone.
